title: Jdilg
compiled_truth: Jdilg is an external contact at [Vinson & Elkins](companies/vinson-elkins). Over the corpus period (2000-03-21 to 2001-11-26), Jdilg sent 14 and received 40 emails, totalling 54 interactions. Top correspondents: [James Derrick](people/james-derrick) (10), [Skean](people/skean) (4), [Rob Walls](people/rob-walls) (2), [Iii Joor](people/iii-joor) (1), [Scott Wulfe](people/scott-wulfe) (1).
